caption:
What if dressing well simply meant getting out of the way and letting the light do the talking?

There is something about linen in peak season — the way it moves, the way it breathes, the way it makes even a sun-drenched wall feel like the most beautiful backdrop in the world. Two people, one palette, and the kind of effortless ease that only happens when you stop trying so hard.

Dress: @nousaconcept
Shirt & Trousers: @nousaconcept
